has_more.description: True when older messages exist; page with `latest` set to the oldest returned ts.

user.description: Raw Slack user ID of the author (e.g. U0123456789). Keep for follow-up calls; do not show to the user.

user_display_name.description: Human-readable author name resolved via users.info. Use this in user-facing output. Absent when resolution failed.

thread_ts.description: Present on threaded replies: the parent message's ts.
